creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
We have lost the jpg that provides additional context.
Since we're loading acpi.ko, that means we're in the boot loader.
The boot loader has changed significantly since this bug report.
There's also not quite enough information to try to recreate this issue now, since generically, PXE booting does work.
I'm closing this bug. Please file a new one and cc me if this issue persists in FreeBSD 11 or 12. thanks.
